chinese_news.title: 机器人启蒙，需要一所能“犯错”的幼儿园
chinese_news.summary:
2024年，强化学习奠基人理查德·萨顿与他的导师安德鲁·巴托共同获得了图灵奖。

这个奖项来得不算早。过去三十年，萨顿的理论支撑了AlphaGo、ChatGPT等系统的进化，但他三十年前写下的理论，直到今天才被具身智能行业真正理解：

智能体要从试错中学习，要从真实经验里进化。

2023年，萨顿参与创办非营利研究机构Openmind。2025年4月，萨顿在联合发表的文章《欢迎来到经验时代（Welcome to the Era of Experience）》中，再次一针见血地指出：

“新一代智能体，必须拥有像人类一样在长时间尺度上不断推进的经验流，在真实的物理反馈中实现自我进化。”

这一次，除了理论之外，萨顿把目光投向了更远的地方。

今年5月，萨顿与他山科技在加拿大正式签约，以长期合作的形式共同推进一个名为“机器人幼儿园”的项目。

chinese_news.title: 半价享顶级性能！天工 SkyClaw Agent 模型限时免费试用
chinese_news.summary:
5月26日，昆仑万维旗下天工 AI 正式推出高性能 Agent 模型 SkyClaw-v1.0，并同步发布轻量化版本 SkyClaw-v1.0-lite，兼具顶尖性能与极致性价比。

SkyClaw-v1.0 支持百万token上下文，深度适配各类真实智能体工作场景，重点优化复杂工具调用、多轮任务执行、代码生成、文件编辑、交互式应用构建与研究型数据分析。模型经过大规模 mid-train、高质量合成任务 SFT 与端到端强化学习优化，可在 OpenClaw、Hermes、Nanobot 等主流 Agent 环境中运行，同时适配Claude Code、Codex 等代码 Agent 框架，通用性与兼容性拉满。

Agent 模型和 Agent framework 的组合，正在改变模型的使用方式。过去，模型主要回答问题；现在，模型被放进一个能读取仓库、调用工具、编辑文件、运行测试、观察反馈的执行环境里，开始承担完整工作流。SkyClaw-v1.0 针对的正是这个阶段：让模型在长上下文和工具环境中持续推进任务，而不是只生成一段答案。<

chinese_news.title: 36氪首发 | 国家级产业基金出手，桥田智能获亿元融资
chinese_news.summary:
硬氪获悉，上海桥田智能设备有限公司（下称“桥田智能”）已完成A+轮亿元级融资，由国家工业母机产业投资基金独家投资。资金将用于高端产能扩建、核心技术研发迭代及全球化市场布局。

桥田智能成立于2016年，专注于汽车主机厂机器人末端及周边设备，产品矩阵涵盖快换盘、磁力换模系统、修磨机、工业连接器等。公司此前已获吉利厚同、哇牛资本、美的资本、浙创投等产业资本投资。

公司创始人兼董事长刘小平拥有20年行业经验，曾任日本沙迪克生产厂长、技术总监，2010年曾创立桥田精密为KUKA机器人提供OEM服务。

公司去年底正式成为北京奔驰国产化快换盘设备供应商，并已主动出海对接德国奔驰及欧洲头部车企。2026年一季度则实现30%-40%增长。

李世尊丨集思科技CEO

大家好，我是集思科技

chinese_news.title: 对话云鲸CEO张峻彬：理解人性，告别天真
chinese_news.summary:
作者 | 黄楠

编辑 | 袁斯来

36岁时，云鲸CEO张峻彬意识到，自己不能再只做一个温和的人。

他做过一些得罪人的决定，但更多时候，张峻彬不善于说重话，以至于有人私下说他有些优柔寡断。“公司内部都说，要是彬哥对你的评价是‘还行’，说明你这东西已经很烂了。”他自己开玩笑。

过去几年，这种性格底色没有暴露太大短板。因为张峻彬更多泡在产品里，离琐碎而复杂的事务保持着一定距离。他喜欢自己做的事，也的确得以找到一角纯粹之地沉浸其中。

但一个产品经理终究不是CEO。成功的一把手可以放权、但不能让公司离手，并会在关键时刻手起刀落。“我以前太喜欢做产品了，也太温和，只做自己喜欢的事，不是一个合格的CEO。”张峻彬说。

也是在他埋头做产品的几年，云鲸内部的问题开始累积。你如果身处云鲸内部，会看到部门内耗，对接人不断更换，老员工相继流失。这些事看似分散，却最终指向同一个原因：没有一个人能将公司从上到下拧成一根绳。

最终，病灶还是摆到张

prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC Top News (Trump endorsement, Cornyn-Paxton primary)

prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Options volumes lean bullish in GLD and GDX; geopolitical tensions (Iran, Middle East) and heat records support safe-haven demand.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC (gold options battle), BBC World (Iran strikes, Lebanon escalation)

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Starlink in-flight Wi-Fi (as deployed by American Airlines) achieve >80% uptime SLA compliance across 500+ planes by 2026-10-31?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: American Airlines investor filings or quarterly earnings call disclosures; SEC 10-Q reports.
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Retail investors focus on headline adoption but ignore operational risk of new satellite-based infrastructure; no market yet prices execution risk.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CNBC reports American Airlines picks Starlink for 500+ planes; no existing market measures SLA compliance risk.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will NEAR Protocol token close above $15 USD on 2026-11-30 (excluding exchange rate volatility)?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: CoinGecko or CoinMarketCap 30-day VWAP; Kraken or Bybit spot price feeds.
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Arthur Hayes bullish commentary (Cointelegraph: 20x upside potential) lacks market pricing; AI data center thesis (TeraWulf momentum) aligns with on-chain compute narratives NEAR promotes.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Cointelegraph (Arthur Hayes NEAR 20x call), TeraWulf AI expansion, bitcoin mining stocks rally on AI infrastructure.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Huobi exchange regain UK regulatory approval or re-launch UK-compliant operations by 2027-06-30?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: UK FCA register; Huobi official press releases; CoinDesk/crypto regulatory tracker.
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: UK sanctions Huobi over Russia crypto networks; market hasn't priced binary outcome of forced exit vs. compliance pivot.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CoinDesk (UK sanctions Huobi and ruble stablecoin issuer); geopolitical reversal in Russia-Ukraine could unlock re-entry.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will XRP hit $2.50 by 2026-09-30 if XRPL's new AMM amendment passes and DeFi TVL on XRP rises to >$500M?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: XRP ledger amendment voting records (XRPL.org); DeFi Llama TVL tracker for XRP; CoinGecko spot price.
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: CoinDesk flags XRPL AMM as closing biggest DeFi gap but no market prices AMM adoption + TVL + price correlation; Clarity Act talk is regulatory theater unless tax clarity drives institutional adoption.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CoinDesk (XRPL AMM amendment, Clarity Act limitations); Joe Lubin's SharpLink Ethereum treasury integration signals institutional DeFi momentum.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will SpaceX-Tesla merger announcement occur by 2026-12-31?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: SEC filings (8-K or S-1); official Musk/Tesla/SpaceX press release; Bloomberg/CNBC primary source reporting.
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: CNBC reports 'chatter' and expert speculation but market hasn't priced Musk's historical M&A inertia vs. near-term IPO distraction; institutional hedging undervalues this optionality.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CNBC merger speculation, SpaceX June 2026 IPO window, American Airlines Starlink deal signals co-branding momentum.

investment_theses.thesis: Long WTI crude and XLE (energy ETF) on Strait of Hormuz closure risk and geopolitical supply shock through Q3 2026.
supporting_signals: Piper Sandler warns Strait of Hormuz closure could persist months, sending crude to new highs this summer (CNBC)
BBC reports Iran condemns US strikes as gross violation of ceasefire; Israel intensifies Lebanon strikes (escalation cycle)
Internet returning to Iran after blackout signals potential further regional tension, not de-escalation
investment_theses.counter_view: OPEC+ production cuts + strategic reserves drawdown could cap upside; economic slowdown in China/Europe dampens demand recovery.
investment_theses.expression: Long XLE (Energy Select ETF) or WTI front-month futures; hedge with DXY long if dollar strength offsets oil gains.

investment_theses.thesis: Long NVDA and semiconductor equipment (ASML) on AI data center capex acceleration signaled by TeraWulf's 1 GW Kentucky expansion and bitcoin mining equipment demand.
supporting_signals: Cointelegraph: Bitcoin mining stocks jump as AI infrastructure boom boosts sector outlook; TeraWulf acquires Kentucky site, planned 1 GW capacity
TeraWulf jumps 13% on AI data center expansion (CoinDesk)
Kunteng (Kunan) SkyClaw v1.0 model launch signals China AI capex race intensifying; 36Kr reports humanoid robots >80% global market share
investment_theses.counter_view: NVDA valuations already price AI capex; margin pressure from competition (AMD, Intel foundry ramp); geopolitical chip export controls (China).
investment_theses.expression: Long NVDA calls (3-month ATM or slightly ITM); pair trade: long NVDA, short SMH if momentum exhausts.

investment_theses.thesis: Short prediction market volatility and arb Polymarket closure risk vs. offshore alternatives on Spain's gambling license crackdown.
supporting_signals: Cointelegraph: Spanish authorities block Polymarket and Kalshi over gambling laws (regulatory arc expanding across EU)
CoinDesk: Trump praises prediction markets, defends CFTC as court cases compound (bifurcated regulatory environment: US political support vs. EU/UK headwinds)
UK sanctions HTX, Huobi over Russia networks; regulatory scrutiny broadens beyond crypto into prediction market infrastructure
investment_theses.counter_view: Polymarket/Kalshi pivot to VPN/offshore routing reduces actual user friction; political support (Trump) may override EU enforcement.
investment_theses.expression: Short POLY tokens (if listed; OTC or Manifold proxy); long Manifold or decentralized prediction market tokens (Omen, Metaculus meta-shares) as beneficiaries of centralized platform exodus.

investment_theses.thesis: Long BTC/ETH ratio (via BTC long, ETH short or BTC perps) if geopolitical premium (Iran, Strait of Hormuz) elevates safe-haven demand but AI-driven ETH DeFi adoption plateaus.
supporting_signals: Cointelegraph: Bitcoin liquidation hunts control BTC at $77K amid new Iran peace deal doubts (risk-on/off volatility favors BTC)
Gold options lean bullish (GLD, GDX); geopolitical tail risk (Israel-Hezbollah, Iran strikes) traditionally favor BTC over ETH
XRPL AMM and SharpLink Ethereum treasury do not yet move ETH spot price; DeFi TVL concentration on Ethereum not accelerating (36Kr/Caixin reports focus on China humanoid + agent AI, not crypto DeFi)
investment_theses.counter_view: ETH staking yields and Shanghai narrative recapture institutional demand; Ethereum layer-2 scaling (Arbitrum, Optimism) drive TVL faster than XRPL.
investment_theses.expression: Long BTC (spot or 3-month perps); short ETH (spot or short-dated call spreads) or use synthetic BTC/ETH ratio derivative if available.

investment_theses.thesis: Long NEAR Protocol (NEAR) on combination of Arthur Hayes bullish narrative, on-chain compute demand from AI infrastructure buildout, and potential institutional adoption via SharpLink treasury integration.
supporting_signals: Cointelegraph: NEAR token 'potential to grow 20x' per Arthur Hayes
CoinDesk: Joe Lubin-backed SharpLink (Ethereum treasury firm) to join Russell indexes, signaling institutional appetite for DeFi infrastructure
TeraWulf, bitcoin mining sector rallying on AI capex; on-chain compute (NEAR's Nightshade sharding) positioned to capture AI + crypto convergence
investment_theses.counter_view: Arthur Hayes calls often mark local tops; NEAR still low liquidity relative to SOL/ETH; no confirmed institutional lock-in yet.
investment_theses.expression: Long NEAR spot or 3-month call spreads (e.g., $10–$15 bull call); size smaller than BTC/ETH given illiquidity.
